title: Gripleaf
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gripleaves''' were an aggressive [[Plant/Legends|plant]] native to [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. They were vines that would trap a passer-by and suspend them several [[Meter/Legends|meters]] above the jungle floor, within easy reach of predators. They had waxy leaves, and their vine fibers were nearly as strong as [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] cable.

During the [[Summertime War]], the guerrillas would hang the dead carcasses of their foe by the neck with these vines.

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
